title: Receipts Depositary Corporation Raises $7 Million to Modernize Depositary Receipts for Digital and Alternative Assets
author: Prnewswire
description: Receipts Depositary Corporation (RDC), a depositary specializing in digital and alternative assets, closed a $7 million oversubscribed funding round led by LiveOak Ventures. The capital will support development of next-generation depositary receipt products, expansion of market distribution, and team scaling ahead of new product launches.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Participated as a strategic investor in RDC's funding round, indicating confidence in the depositary receipt modernization opportunity and potential synergies with its market infrastructure operations.

title: OTC Markets Group Names Thomas Fasano Head of Broker-Dealer Sales
author: Otc Markets Group Inc.
description: OTC Markets Group appointed Thomas Fasano as Senior Vice President and Head of Broker-Dealer Sales. Fasano joins from Citi with extensive experience in equity markets, market making, and broker-dealer relationships. The appointment comes as OTC Markets expands overnight trading access and grows its broker-dealer subscriber base, which increased to 145 unique subscribers by year-end 2025, with OTC Link revenue up 17% in 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is expanding its leadership with an experienced executive hire, growing its broker-dealer subscriber base (145 subscribers, up from 141), and achieving 17% revenue growth in OTC Link in 2025. These metrics indicate business expansion and operational momentum.

title: MCAP Announces Senior Hire in Relationship Management
author: Prnewswire
description: MCAP Inc. (OTC:MCAP) hired Jeff Mendl as Director of Relationship Management at its broker-dealer subsidiary MCAP LLC. Mendl joins from OTC Markets Group where he was Head of Broker-Dealer Sales and will focus on expanding MCAP's customer base and developing execution solutions for broker-dealers, market makers, and institutional clients.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The hiring of an experienced executive from a major competitor (OTC Markets Group) with deep equities market expertise and strong industry connections signals MCAP's growth strategy and confidence in expanding its broker-dealer and institutional customer base. This strategic talent acquisition is typically viewed positively by investors.

While OTC Markets Group lost a senior executive to a competitor, this is a routine business occurrence and does not indicate fundamental issues with the company. The departure is presented as a career move rather than a sign of distress.

title: Virtualware appoints Jason Paltrowitz, Crossbridge Advisors founder, to International Advisory Board
author: Na
description: Virtualware, a European enterprise 3D software and immersive technologies company listed on Euronext Growth Paris, has appointed Jason Paltrowitz, founder of Crossbridge Advisors, to its International Advisory Board. Paltrowitz will advise on U.S. market access and capital markets strategy, supporting the company's push to broaden investor reach following its June 2025 listing. The appointment reflects Virtualware's strategic focus on North America, which now represents 40% of 2025 revenue, with the company projecting 30% organic revenue growth in 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only as a former employer of the newly appointed advisor. No direct business developments or performance metrics related to the company are discussed.

title: OTC Markets Group Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Delivering Strong Revenue, Operating Income, and Earnings Growth
author: Otc Markets Group Inc.
description: OTC Markets Group reported strong Q1 2026 results with gross revenues up 14% to $34.8 million, operating income up 19% to $8.6 million, and diluted EPS up 18% to $0.59. The company saw significant growth in OTC Link revenues (up 31%), driven by higher trading volumes, and Corporate Services revenues (up 19%), led by the OTCID market launch. The company returned $6.8 million to shareholders and announced a $0.30 per share dividend.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong financial performance across all key metrics: 14% revenue growth, 19% operating income growth, 18% EPS growth, and 31% growth in OTC Link revenues. Successful launch of OTCID market driving 51% revenue growth in that segment. Increased shareholder returns (33% increase in cash returned) and expansion into Asia-Pacific markets demonstrate positive momentum and strategic growth initiatives.
